digest.en: US President Trump canceled a trip by US negotiators to Pakistan. Iran's Foreign Minister Araghchi left Islamabad without meeting US envoys. Pakistani Deputy PM stated efforts to achieve peace and stability in the region will continue.
digest.hi: ईरान और खाड़ी देशों में अमेरिकी टेक कंपनियों के बीच तनाव बढ़ रहा है। ईरान ने अमेरिकी टेक कंपनियों को निशाना बनाकर जंग की परिभाषा बदल दी है। इस तनाव के कारण दुनिया भर में 3 करोड़ लोग गरीब हो सकते हैं।

articles.title: Trump cancels US negotiators’ trip to Pakistan for peace talks as Araghchi leaves Islamabad without
articles.summary: US President Trump cancelled a trip by US negotiators to Pakistan for peace talks after Iranian diplomat Araghchi left Islamabad without a deal. The move comes amid strained relations between the US and Pakistan.

articles.title: Punjab pull off record chase against Delhi despite Rahul ton
articles.summary: Punjab pulled off a record chase against Delhi in a cricket match despite a century from Rahul. The team's victory was a surprise upset in a highly anticipated match. Punjab pull off record chase against Delhi despite Rahul ton.

articles.title: Explosions and gunfire as armed groups launch co-ordinated attacks across Mali
articles.summary: Armed groups launched co-ordinated attacks across Mali, sparking explosions and gunfire in the centre and north. The attacks are described as the largest jihadist assault in years, with witnesses reporting clashes.

articles.title: Iran’s Foreign Minister leaves Islamabad without meeting U.S. envoys, say Pakistan officials
articles.summary: Iran's Foreign Minister met Pakistan's Army chief and resumed commercial flights from Tehran's airport. Iran resumes commercial flights from Tehran’s international airport for the first time since the conflict with the U. S.

articles.title: Immigration Arrests In US Down By Nearly 12% After Minneapolis Killings
articles.summary: US immigration arrests decreased by nearly 12% after the Minneapolis killings. 46% of people arrested by ICE had no criminal charges. Nationally, 46% of the people ICE arrested in 5 weeks before February 4 had no criminal charges.

articles.title: Oil Tanker Hijacked Off Somalia Coast, Taken Into Its Territorial Waters
articles.summary: A tanker was hijacked off Somalia's coast and taken into its waters northeast of Mareeyo. The tanker was seized northeast of the Somali city of Mareeyo on Tuesday. Oil Tanker Hijacked Off Somalia Coast, Taken Into Its Territorial Waters.

articles.title: Efforts to achieve peace, stability in region to continue: Pakistan's Deputy PM
articles.summary: Pakistan's Deputy PM vowed to continue efforts for regional peace and stability. There is no official word on whether direct talks between Washington and Tehran will take place during the visit.

articles.title: US Navy hunting for Iranian mines in Strait of Hormuz: Why reopening world’s oil chokepoint could
articles.summary: The US Navy is searching for Iranian mines in the Strait of Hormuz, a critical oil shipping route. The operation aims to ensure safe passage through the waterway, which is a key chokepoint for global oil supplies.

articles.title: Witkoff, Kushner set to head to Pakistan for Iran peace talks today
articles.summary: Jason Witkoff and Jared Kushner are set to head to Pakistan for Iran peace talks. The talks are scheduled to take place today, with the US aiming to facilitate discussions on Iran's influence in the region.

articles.title: Israeli attacks kill four in southern Lebanon
articles.summary: Israeli raids killed four people in southern Lebanon after targeting a truck and a motorcycle in the town of Yohmor al-Shaqif. State media reported the fatalities in the recent attacks.

articles.title: Ukrainian Drone Hits Building In Russian City 1,900 Kms Away From Kyiv
articles.summary: A Ukrainian drone hit a building in a Russian city 1900 kilometers from Kyiv, with smoke seen pouring out of a high-rise. Video published on social media site X showed smoke pouring out of the top of a high-rise building.

articles.title: Iran's Foreign Minister Araghchi meets Pakistan Army chief Munir
articles.summary: Iran's Foreign Minister Araghchi met with Pakistan's Army chief Munir, but there is no clarity on whether direct talks between Washington and Tehran will take place during the visit. Iran's Foreign Minister Araghchi meets Pakistan Army chief Munir.

articles.title: Indonesian UN peacekeeper becomes sixth killed in Lebanon
articles.summary: An Indonesian soldier was killed in southern Lebanon, becoming the sixth UN peacekeeper to die in recent hostilities. An Indonesian soldier has become the sixth UN peacekeeper killed in recent hostilities in southern Lebanon.

articles.title: Seven dead in major Russian attack on Ukraine
articles.summary: Four people died in a strike on a residential building in Dnipro, Ukraine, during a major Russian attack. The city of Dnipro was hardest hit, with officials saying four died in a strike on a residential building.

articles.title: Flights resume at Tehran airport as US-Iran ceasefire holds
articles.summary: International flights resumed at Tehran's Imam Khomeini International Airport after weeks of disruption due to the war. International flights have resumed at Tehran’s Imam Khomeini International Airport, after weeks of disruption by the war.

articles.title: Armed groups stage simultaneous attacks across Mali
articles.summary: Armed groups attacked Mali's capital and main airport. Several locations across the country were also targeted. Armed groups have attacked Mali’s capital, its main airport, and several locations across the country.

articles.title: Europe Prepares for a Longer War in Ukraine, With No Strategy to End It
articles.summary: Europe prepares for a longer war in Ukraine with no clear path to victory or negotiated peace for Russia or Ukraine. With American dealmakers wrapped up with Iran, neither Russia nor Ukraine has a clear path to victory.

articles.title: Trump claims progress in Mideast wars, but grievances could reignite them
articles.summary: US President Trump claims progress in Middle East wars, citing achievements. However, underlying grievances could reignite conflicts. Trump claims progress in Mideast wars, but grievances could reignite them AP News.

articles.title: Palestinians in West Bank and some in Gaza vote in local elections
articles.summary: Palestinians in the West Bank and some Gaza residents vote in local elections. Hamas and other groups do not participate. Local elections are held in the occupied West Bank and in one Gazan city, though Hamas and other groups are not taking part.

articles.title: Vance on 'standby' as Witkoff, Kushner to reach Pakistan on April 25 for talks with Iran, White
articles.summary: US officials Vance, Witkoff, and Kushner plan to meet with Pakistani leaders on April 25. Iran has ruled out direct talks with American representatives. Iran made it clear that there would be no direct negotiations with American government representatives.

articles.title: Terrorists launch simultaneous attacks in Mali, authorities say
articles.summary: Terrorists launch coordinated attacks in multiple locations across Mali. The country's army reports the incidents. Terrorists have carried out attacks in various locations across Mali, according to the country's army.

articles.title: ईरान ने खाड़ी देशों में अमेरिकी टेक कंपनियों को निशाना बनाकर जंग की परिभाषा कैसे बदली?

articles.summary: ईरान में अमेरिका और इसराइल के हमलों के बाद सर्वोच्च नेता सार्वजनिक तौर पर नहीं दिखे हैं. इस बीच राजनयिक स्तर पर लिए गए कुछ फ़ैसलों में ईरानी नेतृत्व में मतभेद भी साफ़ नज़र आया है.

articles.title: हिल जाएगी दुनिया... गरीब हो जाएंगे 3 करोड़ लोग, अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध बना वजह
articles.summary: अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध के कारण 3 करोड़ लोग गरीब हो सकते हैं। यह चेतावनी एक रिपोर्ट में दी गई है। दुनिया पर इसके प्रभाव की आशंका जताई जा रही है। गरीब हो जाएंगे 3 करोड़ लोग, अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध बना वजह AajTak।

articles.title: ट्रंप के बार-बार हमलों पर भारत की नपी-तुली, संतुलित प्रतिक्रिया की वजह क्या है?
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति के भारत को 'धरती पर नरक' कहे जाने पर भारत की प्रतिक्रिया संतुलित रही. विपक्षी पार्टी कांग्रेस ने मोदी सरकार की प्रतिक्रिया को 'बेहद कमज़ोर' बताया. अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति के भारत को 'धरती पर नरक' कहे जाने वाले पोस्ट को लेकर कई प्रतिक्रियाएं आ रही हैं.

hi.title: ट्रंप के बार-बार हमलों पर भारत की नपी-तुली, संतुलित प्रतिक्रिया की वजह क्या है?

articles.title: पश्चिम एशिया तनाव से क्यों कांपा पाकिस्तान?: युद्ध में नहीं फिर भी हो रहा बर्बाद, जानिए क्या कहती
articles.summary: पाकिस्तान पश्चिम एशिया तनाव के कारण प्रभावित हो रहा है, भले ही वह युद्ध में शामिल नहीं है। एक रिपोर्ट के अनुसार, इस तनाव के कारण पाकिस्तान को नुकसान हो रहा है। इसके प्रभावों पर रिपोर्ट में चर्चा की गई है।
